items.name_cn:
Code: 666203
[MCM] Anya Mini Basket Bag has two carrying options: use the rivet top handle or a detachable shoulder strap. This small bag is crafted from Visetos print coated canvas with a checkered interior, a top zipper to protect personal items, and is an ideal choice for travel. Detachable leather shoulder strap
Rivet-decorated leather handle
Top zipper closure
Single bag, printed cotton-texture canvas lining
Dimensions: 20x17x9cm

items.name_en: Code: 666226. Medium, 🔗Millie Visetos Crossbody Bag, MCM's long history is revealed through every feature of the Millie series 😇. Made of lightweight Visetos material and accented with Nappa leather trim, it is a classic modern carry-all that combines dynamic portability with classic elegance. Small approx: 18.5x11.5x4cm Medium approx: 23.5x13.5x5cm Removable crossbody strap with chain and leather decoration, Laurel leaf lock closure, exterior back slit pocket, interior open pocket and zip pocket, interior card slot, leather trim, metal-tone hardware, fabric lining

items.name_en: Code: 666242 💄[MCM] New Fall/Winter SOFT BERLIN Retro Mini Square Bag: The design inspiration for the Berlin series comes from MCM's roots in travel. This waist bag exudes feminine elegance, drawing design inspiration from classic hard suitcases. It features a detachable leather crossbody strap, a top leather handle, a laurel leaf carved closure mechanism, 2 internal compartments, a side zipper pocket and card slot, silver metal protective feet, and fabric lining ❤️ Dimensions: 12x15x7

items.name_en: Code: 666703, New MCM Toni Visetos Shopping Bag New Look, Super Beautiful 👗 This small shopping bag is versatile and timeless. Don't be fooled by the size of this mini shopping bag; it features spacious compartments both inside and out to store all your small essentials. The cotton canvas lining features a street fashion-inspired print, subtly preserving MCM's adventurous aesthetic spirit. With the included crossbody strap, it offers hands-free functionality and better portability. No ❤️ charm Size: 18.5x19x9.5cm Bag opening width: 26cm Removable adjustable shoulder strap Zipper closure External back slit pocket Internal zip pocket Internal open pocket Leather trim Nappa leather trim Metal-tone hardware Fabric lining External D-ring decoration

items.name_en: Coffee Gold Hardware · 26cm
items.name_cn:
Coffee Gold Hardware · 26cm
The most elegant Sac de Jour series, a timeless classic. Exquisite calfskin with a clear texture and rich luster, very luxurious! The 26cm version comes with a middle divider, can be removed to use as a clutch, and the shoulder strap is adjustable for your preferred length. The logo is very small, perfectly interpreting the style of understated luxury.
Model: 421863/477477
Size: 26x20.5x12.5cm
(26cm comes with a middle divider)
